Login.title: LoL Tracker
Login.description: Track your League of Legends games, coaching sessions, and improve your gameplay.
Login.errorInviteRequired: An invite code is required to create a new account.
Login.errorInviteInvalid: That invite code is invalid or has already been used.
Login.errorInviteExpired: That invite code has expired. Ask the admin for a new one.
Login.errorAccountDeactivated: Your account has been deactivated. Contact the admin for help.
Login.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Just sign in without a code.
Login.demoModeDescription: Select an account to explore the app with sample data.

Dashboard.heading: Dashboard
Dashboard.linkRiotAccount: Link your Riot account in <link>Settings</link> to get started.
Dashboard.setRolePreferences: Set your preferred roles in <link>Settings</link> to see which games are on-role.
Dashboard.selectRegion: Select your region in <link>Settings</link> to ensure your matches sync from the correct server.
Dashboard.lpTrendInDays: {lpChange} LP in last {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
Dashboard.noRankData: No rank data yet. Update your games to see your rank.
Dashboard.readyToCompleteDaysAgo: Ready to complete · {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} ago
Dashboard.nextDueIn: Next due in {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}
Dashboard.daysAgo: {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} ago

Matches.heading: Matches
Matches.linkRiotAccount: Link your Riot account in <link>Settings</link> to import games.
Matches.setRolePreferences: Set your preferred roles in <link>Settings</link> to see which games are on-role.
Matches.selectRegion: Select your region in <link>Settings</link> to ensure your matches sync from the correct server.
Matches.noMatchesEmpty: No matches yet. Click Update games to get started.

MatchDetail.reviewCtaWithNotes: This game has notes but hasn't been fully reviewed yet.
MatchDetail.reviewCtaWithoutNotes: This game hasn't been reviewed yet.
MatchDetail.reviewCtaSubtext: Head to the Review page to add highlights, notes, and VOD review.

Review.setRolePreferences: Set your preferred roles in <link>Settings</link> to see which games are on-role.
Review.selectRegion: Select your region in <link>Settings</link> to ensure your matches sync from the correct server.
Review.allCaughtUp: All caught up! No games waiting for review.
Review.gamesWaitingForReview: {count, plural, one {# game} other {# games}} waiting for review
Review.vodReviewNotesPlaceholder: What did you learn from watching the VOD?
Review.markAllReviewedConfirmDescription: This will skip VOD review for all remaining games. This action cannot be undone from this page.

emptyStates.noPostGameDescription: All games have been reviewed or are waiting for VOD review.
emptyStates.noVodReviewDescription: Complete post-game reviews first, then they'll appear here for VOD review.
emptyStates.noCompletedDescription: Reviewed games will appear here for reference.

Review.postGameHint: These games haven't been reviewed yet. Add highlights, notes, and optionally a VOD link.
Review.vodReviewHint: These games have post-game notes but haven't been VOD-reviewed yet. Watch the VOD and add your takeaways.
Review.reviewedGamesCount: {count, plural, one {# reviewed game} other {# reviewed games}}.
Review.disabledSaveTooltip: Add at least one highlight, note, or VOD link to save.

toasts.bulkMarkReviewed: Marked {count, plural, one {# game} other {# games}} as reviewed.
toasts.failedToMarkReviewed: Failed to mark games as reviewed.

Scout.pageDescription: Pre-game scouting report for your matchups.
Scout.noGamesFoundAsChampion: No past games found as {yourChampion} against {enemyChampion}.
Scout.clearYourChampionHint: Try clearing the "Your Champion" filter to see all games against this matchup.
Scout.selectEnemyPrompt: Select an enemy champion above to view your scouting report.

toasts.failedToLoadReport: Couldn't load the scouting report. Please try again.

MatchupNotes.placeholder: Write your notes about this matchup...
MatchupNotes.noNotes: No matchup notes yet. Use the Scout page to add notes.

AiInsights.premiumRequired: AI insights are available for premium users.
AiInsights.noApiKey: AI insights are not configured. Add a Google Gemini API key to enable this feature.

toasts.premiumRequired: AI insights require a premium account.

Analytics.gamesAnalyzed: {count, plural, one {# game} other {# games}} analyzed.
Analytics.importGamesFirst: Import some games first to see your analytics.
Analytics.noDataYetDescription: Fetch your ranked games to see charts and statistics.
Analytics.notEnoughRankData: Not enough rank data yet. Play more ranked games to see your LP journey.
Analytics.coachingBandsDescription: Shaded areas show the time between coaching sessions.
Analytics.noMatchupData: No matchup data yet. Play more games to see win rates by matchup.
Analytics.noChampionData: No champion data yet. Play some games to see your champion stats.

Coaching.title: Coaching
Coaching.subtitleEmpty: Track your coaching sessions and improvement.
Coaching.subtitleSummary: {totalSessions, plural, one {# session} other {# sessions}} · {activeCount, plural, one {# active action item} other {# active action items}}
Coaching.emptyStateDescription: Schedule your first coaching session to start tracking your improvement.
Coaching.missingFocusAreasAndActionItems: Missing focus areas and action items
Coaching.intervalRelatedNotes: {count, plural, one {# related note} other {# related notes}}
Coaching.overdueSession: {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} overdue

toasts.updateActionItemError: Couldn't update the action item. Please try again.

CoachingDetail.sessionIsScheduledDescription: After your coaching, fill in notes and action items.
CoachingDetail.gamesDiscussed: {count, plural, one {# game discussed} other {# games discussed}}
CoachingDetail.actionItemsDescription: {completed}/{total} completed. Click the status icon to cycle through: pending → in progress → completed.
CoachingDetail.noActionItems: No action items for this session.
CoachingDetail.progressDescription: {count, plural, one {# game played} other {# games played}} since this coaching session.
CoachingDetail.noGamesSinceSession: No games played since this coaching session yet.
CoachingDetail.deleteConfirm: Delete this coaching session? This cannot be undone.

CompleteSession.title: Complete coaching session
CompleteSession.subtitle: Fill in what was discussed and create action items.
CompleteSession.topicsCoveredDescription: Select all topics that were actually covered during the session.
CompleteSession.sessionNotesPlaceholder: Key takeaways, what the coach said, areas to focus on...
CompleteSession.actionItemsDescription: What should you work on before the next coaching session?

toasts.topicRequired: Please select at least one topic covered.

EditSession.title: Edit coaching session
EditSession.subtitle: Update session details.
EditSession.vodToReviewDescription: Select a game to review during the session.
EditSession.noHighlights: No highlights or lowlights recorded for this match.
EditSession.focusAreasDescription: Topics you want to focus on during the session.
EditSession.topicsCoveredDescription: Topics that were covered during the session.
EditSession.sessionNotesPlaceholder: Key takeaways, what the coach said, areas to focus on...

ActionItems.title: Action items
ActionItems.emptyStateDescription: Create coaching sessions or add standalone action items.
ActionItems.addDescriptionPlaceholder: What do you want to work on?
ActionItems.deleteConfirm: Delete this action item? This cannot be undone.

ScheduleSession.title: Schedule coaching session
ScheduleSession.subtitle: Book a session. You'll fill in notes and action items after the coaching.
ScheduleSession.vodToReviewDescription: Optionally select the game you want to review. You can add this later.
ScheduleSession.noMatchesFound: No matches found. Import your games first.
ScheduleSession.noHighlights: No highlights or lowlights recorded for this game.
ScheduleSession.focusAreasDescription: Optionally note what you want to focus on. Topics will be finalized after the session.

Duo.title: Duo partner
Duo.descriptionDefault: Track your performance when playing with your duo partner.

noPartner.title: No duo partner set
noPartner.description: Configure your duo partner in settings to start tracking your shared games, win rates, and champion synergies.

noGames.title: No duo games found
noGames.description: Your synced matches haven't been scanned for duo games yet. Scan your existing matches or sync new games to get started.

synergy.title: Champion synergy
synergy.emptyState: No champion synergy data yet. Play more duo games to see your best champion combos.

recentGames.title: Recent duo games
recentGames.emptyDescription: Sync your matches to detect games played with your duo partner.

toasts.backfillSuccess: Found {duoFound} duo games out of {processed} matches scanned!
toasts.backfillNone: Scanned {processed} matches but no duo games were found. Try syncing more games first.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Manage your account and Riot Games integration.

riotAccount.title: Riot account
riotAccount.description: Link your Riot Games account to sync your ranked games automatically.
riotAccount.unlinkHelpText: Unlinking will not delete your imported match data.
riotAccount.linkHelpText: Enter your Riot ID in GameName#TagLine format. This is used to import your ranked match history.

languageCard.title: Language & region
languageCard.description: Choose your language and how dates and numbers are displayed.

duoPartner.title: Duo partner
duoPartner.description: Choose your duo partner to track shared games and synergy stats.
duoPartner.searchHint: Type at least 2 characters to search
duoPartner.noUsersFound: No other users with linked Riot accounts found. Invite a friend to get started!

rolePreferences.title: Role preferences
rolePreferences.description: Set your primary and secondary roles. Off-role games will appear dimmed on match cards.
rolePreferences.sameRoleError: Primary and secondary roles must be different.

coachingCadence.title: Coaching cadence
coachingCadence.description: How often you want to have a coaching session. This controls the dashboard coaching widget's urgency states.
coachingCadence.currentLabel: Every {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}

riotAccounts.title: Linked accounts
riotAccounts.description: Manage your linked Riot accounts. You can link up to 5 accounts.
riotAccounts.emptyState: No accounts linked yet. Link your first Riot account to get started.
riotAccounts.addAccountDescription: Link another Riot account to track multiple accounts.
riotAccounts.removeConfirm: Remove this account? Your match data will be kept.
riotAccounts.accountLimitReached: You've reached the maximum of 5 linked accounts.
riotAccounts.addAccountPremiumRequired: Linking additional accounts is a premium feature. Contact the admin to upgrade.
riotAccounts.rolesDescription: Primary and secondary roles for this account
riotAccounts.discoverableOn: This account is now visible in duo partner search.
riotAccounts.discoverableOff: This account is now hidden from duo partner search.

invites.title: Invite friends
invites.description: Generate invite codes to let friends create accounts.
invites.emptyState: No invite codes yet. Generate one to share with friends.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.dialogDescription: This will permanently delete your account, all linked Riot accounts, match history, coaching sessions, goals, and every other piece of data. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.lastAdminError: You are the only admin. Promote another user to admin before deleting your account.
deleteAccount.genericError: Failed to delete account. Please try again.

toasts.riotIdFormatError: Please enter your Riot ID as GameName#TagLine (e.g. Summoner#EUW)
toasts.deleteConfirm: Delete this invite code? This cannot be undone.
toasts.accountSetPrimaryError: Failed to set as main account.

Errors.title: Something went wrong
Errors.description: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again, or go back to the dashboard.

codes.USER_NOT_FOUND: User not found or has no linked Riot account.
codes.TOPIC_REQUIRED: Please select at least one topic covered.

Changelog.title: What's new
Changelog.subtitle: Latest updates and improvements to LoL Tracker
Changelog.empty: No updates yet. Check back soon!

Goals.title: Goals
Goals.subtitle: Set rank targets and track your progress.
Goals.noActiveGoalDescription: Set a rank target to track your climb.
Goals.overdue: Deadline passed on {date}. Goal is still active.
Goals.retireConfirm: Retire this goal? You can set a new one after.
Goals.deleteConfirm: Delete this goal? This cannot be undone.
Goals.newGoalSubtitle: Set a rank target to track your climb.
Goals.noRankData: No rank data available. Sync your account first to set a goal.
Goals.targetRankDescription: Choose the rank you want to reach.
Goals.targetMustBeHigher: Target rank must be higher than your current rank.
Goals.deadlineHelp: A soft deadline. Your goal stays active even after this date.

Challenges.title: Challenges
Challenges.subtitle: Set challenges to improve your gameplay and track progress.
Challenges.noChallengesDescription: Create a challenge to start tracking your improvement.
Challenges.overdue: Deadline passed on {date}. Challenge is still active.
Challenges.retireConfirm: Retire this challenge? This cannot be undone.
Challenges.deleteConfirm: Delete this challenge? This cannot be undone.
Challenges.newChallengeSubtitle: Choose a challenge type to track your improvement.
Challenges.byDateDescription: Set a target rank to reach, with an optional deadline.
Challenges.byGamesDescription: Track a stat over a number of games to build consistency.
Challenges.byGamesConfigDescription: Choose a metric, condition, and threshold to track over a set number of games.
Challenges.noRankData: No rank data available. Sync your account first to set a rank challenge.
Challenges.targetRankDescription: Choose the rank you want to reach.
Challenges.targetMustBeHigher: Target rank must be higher than your current rank.
Challenges.deadlineHelp: A soft deadline. Your challenge stays active even after this date.
Challenges.topicsHelp: Optionally link this challenge to topics you want to improve.
Challenges.noTopicsAvailable: No topics available. You can create topics in settings.

difficulty.easy: This looks easy based on your recent games.
difficulty.feasible: Feasible — close to your current average.
difficulty.challenging: Challenging — you'll need to push yourself.
difficulty.veryChallenging: Very challenging! This is well beyond your recent average.

Challenges.noPastChallengesDescription: Completed, failed, and retired challenges will appear here.

Onboarding.title: Welcome to lol-tracker
Onboarding.subtitle: Let's get your account set up in a few quick steps.

region.heading: Choose your server
region.description: Select the Riot server where you play. This ensures your matches sync from the correct region.
region.label: Server region

riotAccount.heading: Link your Riot account
riotAccount.description: Enter your Riot ID to import your ranked match history. This is required for tracking.
riotAccount.formatError: Please enter your Riot ID as GameName#TagLine

roles.heading: Choose your roles
roles.description: Set your preferred positions. Off-role games will be visually dimmed in your match history.

sync.heading: Sync your games
sync.description: Import your recent ranked matches. The rest will sync automatically in the background after setup.
sync.syncError: Sync failed. You can try again or continue — your games will sync automatically later.

toasts.completeError: Failed to complete setup. Please try again.

Admin.heading: Admin
Admin.usersDescription: Manage registered users and their access.
Admin.matchCountMismatchTooltip: User sees {scoped} matches but {total} exist in database — possible riot_account_id backfill issue
Admin.invitesDescription: Generate invite codes for new users. Codes expire after 7 days.
Admin.noInvites: No invites yet. Generate one to invite a new user.

Feedback.pageSubtitle: Share your ideas, report bugs, or vote on what we should build next.

Premium.gateDescription: This feature is available for premium users. Upgrade your account to unlock it.
Premium.gateContact: Contact the admin to upgrade your account.

Legal.riotDisclaimer: LoL Tracker isn't endorsed by Riot Games and doesn't reflect the views or opinions of Riot Games or anyone officially involved in producing or managing Riot Games properties. Riot Games, and all associated properties are trademarks or registered trademarks of Riot Games, Inc.
Legal.openSourceText: LoL Tracker is open-source software licensed under the GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 (AGPL-3.0). You can view, modify, and redistribute the source code under the terms of this license.

hero.tagline: Track your climb. Master your game.
hero.subtitle: The all-in-one companion for League of Legends players who take ranked seriously. Track matches, review gameplay, and turn coaching into measurable progress.

matchTracking.title: Match tracking
matchTracking.description: Automatically sync your ranked games from Riot. Filter by champion, result, or review status. Export your data anytime.

gameReview.title: Game review
gameReview.description: Build a review habit with a two-phase workflow: quick post-game notes right after playing, then deeper VOD analysis when you're ready.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Visualize your rank journey, win rate trends, matchup stats, and rune performance. See how coaching sessions correlate with your progress.

coaching.title: Coaching hub
coaching.description: Schedule sessions, track action items, and measure your progress between coaching sessions. Never lose track of what your coach told you.

screenshots.heading: See it in action
screenshots.dashboard: Your dashboard gives you a complete overview: current rank, recent games, upcoming coaching, and active action items.
screenshots.analytics: Track your rank journey over time, win rates by matchup, and rune performance across all your games.
screenshots.coaching: Manage coaching sessions, track action items, and measure your progress between sessions.

matchupScout.title: Matchup scout
matchupScout.description: AI-powered scouting reports for your matchups, with your personal stats and notes.

goalTracking.title: Goal tracking
goalTracking.description: Set rank targets and track your progress with visual milestones.

duoPartner.title: Duo partner stats
duoPartner.description: See how you perform with your duo: win rates, champion synergy, and more.

multiAccount.title: Multi-account
multiAccount.description: Link up to 5 Riot accounts and switch between them seamlessly.

bilingual.title: English & Spanish
bilingual.description: Full support for both languages, including all app content and the changelog.

cta.heading: Ready to take your ranked games seriously?
cta.subtitle: Start tracking your improvement today.

footer.riotDisclaimer: LoL Tracker isn't endorsed by Riot Games and doesn't reflect the views or opinions of Riot Games or anyone officially involved in producing or managing Riot Games properties. Riot Games, and all associated properties are trademarks or registered trademarks of Riot Games, Inc.

ChallengeResult.successMessage: You crushed it! Time to set an even bigger goal.
ChallengeResult.failureMessage: Every loss is a lesson. You've got this — try again!
